schema_id.description: Unique identifier for this schema document

change_id.description: Unique identifier for this change record

suite_id.description: Identifier of the suite that was changed

previous_suite_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the suite before the change

new_suite_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the suite after the change

changed_at.description: Timestamp when the change was applied

changed_by.description: Entity (user or component) that performed the change

reason.description: Rationale for why the benchmark was changed

cases_added.description: Identifiers of cases added in this change

cases_removed.description: Identifiers of cases removed in this change

cases_modified.description: Identifiers of cases modified in this change

approval_ref.description: Reference to an approval record that authorised this change

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues detected during the benchmark change

errors.description: Fatal issues detected during the benchmark change
